message:
Experiment configuration:
model_name: null
encryption_key: '***'
results_dir: /workspace/results/v2.1/train
wandb:
  enable: true
  project: TAO Toolkit
  entity: ''
  group: ''
  tags:
  - training
  - tao-toolkit
  reinit: false
  sync_tensorboard: false
  save_code: false
  name: TAO Toolkit training experiment
  run_id: ''
model:
  model_type: ST-GCN
  pretrained_model_path: /workspace/pretrained/st-gcn_3dbp_nvidia.tlt
  input_channels: 3
  dropout: 0.0
  graph_layout: nvidia
  graph_strategy: spatial
  edge_importance_weighting: true
dataset:
  train_dataset:
    data_path: /workspace/dataset/pose_classification/v1.5_correct-focal-length/train_data.npy
    label_path: /workspace/dataset/pose_classification/v1.5_correct-focal-length/train_label.pkl
  val_dataset:
    data_path: /workspace/dataset/pose_classification/v1.5_correct-focal-length/val_data.npy
    label_path: /workspace/dataset/pose_classification/v1.5_correct-focal-length/val_label.pkl
  num_classes: 12
  label_map:
    backhand_1h: 0
    backhand_2h: 1
    backhand_slice: 2
    backhand_volley: 3
    forehand_flat: 4
    forehand_open: 5
    forehand_slice: 6
    forehand_volley: 7
    overhead: 8
    serve_flat: 9
    serve_kick: 10
    serve_slice: 11
  random_choose: true
  random_move: false
  window_size: 40
  batch_size: 16
  num_workers: 4
train:
  num_gpus: 1
  gpu_ids:
  - 0
  num_nodes: 1
  seed: 1234
  cudnn:
    benchmark: false
    deterministic: true
  num_epochs: 80
  checkpoint_interval: 5
  checkpoint_interval_unit: epoch
  validation_interval: 1
  resume_training_checkpoint_path: null
  results_dir: /workspace/results/v2.1/train
  optim:
    optimizer_type: torch.optim.SGD
    lr: 0.1
    momentum: 0.9
    nesterov: true
    weight_decay: 0.0001
    lr_scheduler: MultiStep
    lr_monitor: val_loss
    patience: 1
    min_lr: 0.0001
    lr_steps:
    - 50
    - 70
    lr_decay: 0.1
  grad_clip: 0.0
inference:
  num_gpus: 1
  gpu_ids:
  - 0
  num_nodes: 1
  checkpoint: ???
  trt_engine: null
  results_dir: null
  batch_size: -1
  output_file: null
  test_dataset:
    data_path: null
    label_path: null
evaluate:
  num_gpus: 1
  gpu_ids:
  - 0
  num_nodes: 1
  checkpoint: ???
  trt_engine: null
  results_dir: null
  batch_size: -1
  test_dataset:
    data_path: null
    label_path: null
export:
  results_dir: null
  checkpoint: null
  onnx_file: null
  gpu_id: 0
dataset_convert:
  results_dir: null
  data: null
  pose_type: 3dbp
  num_joints: 34
  input_width: 1920
  input_height: 1080
  focal_length: 1200.0
  sequence_length_max: 300
  sequence_length_min: 10
  sequence_length: 100
  sequence_overlap: 0.5
